task_statement: P7d2 of BRICK 6-surface audit repair: correct the P7d Easy Building declaration ergonomics graph shape and re-close the achievable S6-F4 slice. P7d (0701d) proved the docs/checker-pin content is sound but was not adopted for three reasons recorded in project/brick-protocol/status/kernel/brick-6-p7-easy-building-ergonomics-operator-hold-0701d.md: (1) stale sandbox output parent vs current main -- resolved automatically here because this is a fresh run from current HEAD; (2) a graph-shape bug where two lane-QA nodes fanned out directly into three final-QA nodes with no barrier between the lane-QA fan-in and the final-QA fan-out -- fixed by inserting a single lane-qa-fanin-confirm barrier node before the final-QA fan-out, per the fan-in/fan-out-must-not-be-the-same-event rule recorded in agent/skills/building-coordination/SKILL.md; (3) closure returned a verification_gap concern whose unmet items were 'a fresh external brick build --graph <packet> proof' and 'whole check_profile.py --all green' -- both are broader goal-level proofs, not defects in this slice's own docs/checker-pin content, and 'full Easy-Building dynamic design ergonomics' was already explicitly scoped as a later slice in the P7c task contract. This Building narrows S6-F4 closure to: docs/route wording correctness, CLI raw exception-leak safety, bare `brick` default behavior, and checker negative pins against --large / onboard-as-route / raw exception leakage -- with a structurally correct barrier->fan-out graph shape. It explicitly defers full external graph-packet dynamic-design ergonomics proof as not_proven, matching prior P7b/P7c task scoping, rather than re-declaring an unenforced closure_transition_target_policy hold for verification_gap.
selection_rule: manual graph because S6-F4 requires the big-work route shape itself: task intake -> design fan-out -> design synthesis/plan confirm -> parallel work lanes -> lane QA fan-in -> lane-qa-fanin-confirm barrier -> final QA fan-out -> closure. A linear preset would not preserve the phase contract. P7d2 corrects the P7d (0701d) shape where lane QA fanned directly into three final-QA fan-in targets with no barrier between the fan-in and the next fan-out.
